description: Medidata provides software for clinical trials and life sciences, including the Rave platform for electronic data capture and related study, patient, and data management products. It also offers developer-facing access for integration with parts of its platform.
summary: Medidata exposes a documented Rave Web Services HTTP API surface via Developer Central and a Medidata MCP server at `https://mcp.imedidata.com/mcp` using streamable HTTP; the MCP endpoint requires a JWT bearer token, while public auth details for the Rave API were not found.
